- Deseja uma rotina de exercícios mais divertida? Tente o CROSS! 🎉💪
Se você está cansado dos mesmos exercícios repetitivos, o CROSS é a solução perfeita para tornar seus treinos mais emocionantes e dinâmicos! Com uma mistura de movimentos funcionais, alta intensidade e variação constante, cada sessão de CROSS é única e desafiadora.
Aqui estão algumas razões para você experimentar o CROSS:
- Variedade Infinita: Cada dia traz um novo desafio, mantendo seus treinos sempre interessantes e motivadores.
- Comunidade e Amizade: Treine ao lado de pessoas com objetivos semelhantes, criando um ambiente de apoio e incentivo.
- Desafios Pessoais: Teste seus limites e veja melhorias constantes em força, resistência e habilidades.
- Resultados Rápidos: Com treinos intensos e eficientes, você verá resultados no seu condicionamento físico e na sua saúde geral.

Transforme sua rotina de exercícios e descubra a diversão no CROSS!
🔗 Agende sua primeira aula gratuita pelo link na nossa bio e venha se divertir enquanto treina!

#crossfit #TreinoDivertido #Fitness #VidaSaudável #ComunidadeCROSS Motivação DesafioFitness Resultados CROSSBrasil RotinaDeExercícios BemEstar 🎉💪

Train hard, race harder! 💪🏼
Over the past year I had more than one person tell me that I’m good at biking and running so I should try a triathlon. After making enough excuses I decided basically when the new year hit I was going to do a tri. I picked up another gym membership and got myself in shape to swim. From January until this past weekend I trained for three different events and completed my race inside of my goal time of two hours! As a moment of self awareness: no amount of pool training can prepare you for your first open water swim, that’s a skill I need to work on. Shout out to my wetsuit for being a real team player 😅 
With all that in mind, what’s the next challenge?? 💪🏼💪🏼
#triathlon #athlete #fitness #endurance #multisport

Quiet gym. No distractions. Just me and the work.

Lately everything’s been clicking… focus is sharp, routine is locked in, and things are starting to fall into place the way they’re supposed to.

Funny how that happens when you stop waiting for the “right time” and just start showing up for yourself.

Nothing changes if you don’t put in the work.

#fitness #gymgirls #fitmoms #focus #whatsmeanttobewillbe

I bounced 245lbs for 2 sets of 2 but still. I’m just a 140lb guy that was tryna hit 2times bodyweight back then. I definitely do not reccomended or encourage bouncing bench press reps. I only did it to prep my body for future programming and because Ive never tried repping out 245lbs. Still one wrong move and I’m done for.. #gym #fitness #health #powerlifting

I used to think a resting heart rate of 38 meant I was incredibly fit. 🫀
It took me longer than I’d like to admit to connect the dots — the bloating, the lightheadedness, the hair loss — with not eating enough.
Underfueling doesn’t always look like restriction. Sometimes it looks like a very clean diet that simply doesn’t match your output.
Swipe through and see how many of these resonate. ↓

#fit #fitness #health #womenshealth

If you think working out is just about looking good… you’re already falling behind in real life.
